tasks.subject: Task 1: Test Harness (Vitest + Playwright + CI)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Stand up Vitest and Playwright with a baseline red/green test suite against the current, pre-upgrade code, plus a CI workflow that runs it.

**STATUS: DONE.** tsc baseline is genuinely clean (0 errors) after a small unrelated prep fix (commit 0b9cae4, implicit-any params in testimonial-cards.tsx). An earlier '60 pre-existing errors' claim was a false alarm from a contaminated node_modules state during investigation, not a real issue -- always verify with a full clean reinstall before asserting a baseline. vitest.config.ts uses environment:'node' (jsdom breaks jose's token signing under cross-realm Uint8Array handling); Task 5 overrides per-file via a @vitest-environment jsdom pragma for its DOM-rendering test. Worktree relocated to a sibling directory (not nested under aitutor-api-saas-starter/.worktrees) to avoid a Turbopack nested-lockfile crash ("Next.js package not found").

**Files:**
- Create: vitest.config.ts, playwright.config.ts, lib/db/seed-test.ts, .github/workflows/ci.yml
- Modify: package.json (scripts + devDependencies)
- Test: tests/unit/session.test.ts, tests/unit/utils.test.ts, tests/unit/tiers-limit.test.ts, tests/e2e/auth-and-dashboard.spec.ts, tests/e2e/chatbot.spec.ts

**Verify:** pnpm exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm test && pnpm test:e2e -> tsc clean; 3 files/12 tests pass; e2e 3 passed + chatbot passed-or-skipped

Full code in the plan doc, Task 1 (corrected to match what was actually built).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["vitest.config.ts", "playwright.config.ts", "lib/db/seed-test.ts", ".github/workflows/ci.yml", "package.json", "tests/unit/session.test.ts", "tests/unit/utils.test.ts", "tests/unit/tiers-limit.test.ts", "tests/e2e/auth-and-dashboard.spec.ts", "tests/e2e/chatbot.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm test && pnpm test:e2e", "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Trivial/Patch Bumps + framer-motion to motion Consolidation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Batch every patch/minor-safe dependency bump and consolidate framer-motion/motion into a single motion dependency.

**STATUS: DONE.** One fix cycle: spec review caught dotenv and tailwindcss-react-aria-components bumped across major versions (contradicting the same-major criterion) -- reverted to ^16.4.7 and 1.2.0 respectively. Code quality review: ready to merge, no blocking issues.

**Verify:** pnpm test && pnpm build -> Test Files 4 passed (4) / Tests 22 passed (22), clean build

Full diffs in the plan doc, Task 2 (corrected).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json", "lib/db/drizzle.ts", "components/landing-page/timeline/TimelineContent.tsx", "components/landing-page/hero/hero.tsx", "components/landing-page/timeline/components/testimonial-cards.tsx", "components/landing-page/footer/animated-gradient-background.tsx", "components/landing-page/hero/components/sparkles-text.tsx", "tests/unit/motion-migration.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test && pnpm build", "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: React 19.0.0 to 19.2.7
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bump React, ReactDOM, and their type packages to 19.2.7/19.2.17/19.2.3.

**STATUS: DONE.** One necessary side-fix (verified by spec review): @types/react bump surfaced a real latent type error in components/landing-page/hero/components/glow-effect.tsx (ease: 'linear' needed 'as const'), fixed, zero runtime change. Code quality review: ready to merge, only style nits.

**Verify:** pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit -> Test Files 5 passed (5) / Tests 24 passed (24), clean build, zero tsc errors

Full code in the plan doc, Task 3 (corrected).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json", "tests/unit/react-version.test.ts", "components/landing-page/hero/components/glow-effect.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit", "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Tailwind 4.3.2 + shadcn Component Regeneration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bump Tailwind to 4.3.2 and regenerate all 12 components/ui/*.tsx primitives from the current shadcn registry (unified radix-ui package + data-slot).

**Note:** button.test.tsx needs a `// @vitest-environment jsdom` pragma at the top of the file since the global vitest.config.ts environment is 'node' (see Task 1).

**Verify:** pnpm test && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm build -> Test Files 7 passed (7) / Tests 29 passed (29), no tsc output, clean build

Full diffs and expected-shape checklist in the plan doc, Task 5.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json", "components/ui/avatar.tsx", "components/ui/button.tsx", "components/ui/card.tsx", "components/ui/dropdown-menu.tsx", "components/ui/input.tsx", "components/ui/label.tsx", "components/ui/radio-group.tsx", "components/ui/separator.tsx", "components/ui/sheet.tsx", "components/ui/sidebar.tsx", "components/ui/skeleton.tsx", "components/ui/tooltip.tsx", "hooks/use-mobile.tsx", "tests/unit/button.test.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm build", "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: ai SDK v4 to v7 Hop-by-Hop Upgrade (Chat Streaming)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Mandatory gate-check the external aitutor-api.vercel.app stream format first, then either complete the ai v4->v7 hop-by-hop upgrade (Branch A) or freeze at latest 4.x and document why (Branch B).

**Verify (A):** pnpm exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm test:e2e -- tests/e2e/chatbot.spec.ts -> clean; smoke test passes against real external API
**Verify (B):** pnpm add ai@4.3.19 && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm test:e2e -- tests/e2e/chatbot.spec.ts -> clean; unchanged

Full code for both branches in the plan doc, Task 10.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["components/ai-tutor-api/StreamingChat.tsx", "app/api/chat/route.ts", "package.json", "docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-15-ai-sdk-v4-freeze.md"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm test:e2e -- tests/e2e/chatbot.spec.ts", "modelTier": "complex"}
```

**Verify:** pnpm exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm test && pnpm test:e2e && pnpm build -> all green, plus manual click-through of 13 routes
